titleStmt.title: SII 4.847: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 847. (A.R. No. 34 of 1893). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Ōm svasti . śrī lakṣmīkaustubhalakṣaṇaṁ ghghanaghaṭāsacchāyamabjēkṣaṇaṁ yettējassacarācarasya jagatassānāthyamutpuṣyati . tannābhīnaḷanādabhūtsa bhagavān brahmā śrutīnāṁ kaviryyellīlārasakautukaṁ tanubhritāṁ saṁsārasāṅyāthrakaṁ [. 1*] marīcirasmādutpadya mahōbhirapakajjaḷaiḥ . jagatībhāgyadhaurēyaṁ darśayāmāsa kāśyapaṁ [. 2*] tasmādabhūdbhuvanamaṁgaḷaratnadīpō bhāsāṁ nithassa bhagavānnalinībhujaṁgaḥ . yajyōtirastatimiraṁ bhuvanasya bhūtyai puṣṇātyapaśca mahanīyyatamā giraśca [. 3*]
manudilīpakakutsthamukhāḥ punaḥ kṣitimimāmadhikṛtya sasāgarāṁ . vidadhirē yaśasā pariṇahyatāṁjagadanārataśāradacaṁdrikāṁ [. 4*] Atha sanāthayituṁ vasudhāmimāṁ makhavataśca padaṁbhayabhaṁguraṁ . daśarathaḥprababhūva mahārathaḥ kṣapitadānavavīramanōrathaḥ [. 5*] yatrōdbhavaścavibhavaśca parābhavaśca viśvasya sidhyati mahastadananyasāmyaṁ . pracchādya kaustubhamurasthalanarmmamitraṁ rāmākhyayā daśarathasya sutaḥ kilābhūt [. 6*]
tataḥ kuśōnāma babhūva bhūtyai bhuvassaratnākaramēkhalāyāḥ . Upaprarōhassuravairiśriṣṭiṁ nirasyatē rāmarathāṁggapāṇēḥ [. 7*] Atha vaṁśakartṛṣu gatēṣu kēṣucit vividāpadhānabahumānaśāliṣu . bhuvanādhikārabhuvibhavyamūrjjitaṁ kalayāṁ babhūva kalikālabhūpatiḥ [. 8*] Alaṁcakrē kulaṁ tasya nallasiddhinarēśvaraḥ . pauraṁdaramivōdyānaṁ pārijātamahīruhaḥ [. 9*] Akhilabhuvanarakṣādakṣatāmanvatiṣṭhattadanu manumasiddhirmmēdinībhāgyasiddhiḥ .
Aviraḷapariṇahyatkīrttidugdhābdhivīcīśikhararabhasasīḷadvāsavōdyānavāṭaḥ [. 10*] śrīdēvyāmabhavattasmādbhāgyaiḥ pārōnmukherbhuvaḥ . kalikaṁdachchidā(ḥ)kēḷiḥ cōḷatikkamahīpatiḥ [. 11*] tasthivāṁsastaṭābhōgaiḥ jagmivāṁsō bhujāṁtaraiḥ . dadhirēyasya jaitrāṁkayubhayēpi mahībhṛtaṁ [. 12*] Urāṁsi varnāvalicitritāni karāṁbujāni truṭitāṁgulīni . yasmiN parikrudhyati sēpaṇānāṁ trāṇaṁ kṣamēraṁ natuhētayasvāḥ . 12 Asti taścacivaḥ śrīmān maudgalyamaṇibhūṣaṇaṁ . kīrttigaṁgādhattadi gaṁtaḥWe have perhaps to read gaṁgājalai¨rdhautadigaṁtaḥ.
tripurāṁtakaiḥ [. 14*] stutyaḥ kiṁ tripurāṁtakasya jagatīsīmaṁtamuktāmaṇiryyasmin vismayanīyyavikramarasē dṛṣṭē manō manyatē . vāgdēvyāḥ puruṣāvatāramudadhērdēhāṁtarāvasthitiṁ gōtrādrēḥ paricaṁkramaṁ ratipatēḥ pratyakṣacāraṁ ca naḥ [. 15*] kommāṁbbātanayaḥ śrīmānnanna yāmātyanaṁddanaḥ . sa kathaṁ śakyatē stōtuṁ parasēvaparāṇmukhaḥ [. 16*] kāṁcīpurē varadadhāmni rasēṣurudrasaṁkhyē śakābdaparidhau madhumāsasīmni . dīpāya maṁtritilakaḥ tripurāṁtakāryyō dvātriṁśadaṁ pradiśatisma payasvinīrggāḥ [. 17*]
Digital edition of SII 4.847 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
